title: rosa lutea var. punicea
intro: Rosa lutea var. punicea, also known as the wild yellow rose or Prairie rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa lutea var. punicea include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin health. Herbal preparations of Rosa lutea var. punicea typically involve infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's essential oil in topical applications.
